conversio-fallibilis

Three recovery postures for fallible conversio: inline Ōćź, Ōćź propagation, and fac/cape.

Syntax: Ōå” | functio ŌĆ” ŌåÆ T Ōćź E | fac { ŌĆ” } cape err { ŌĆ” }

Category

conversion

Related

  • Ōå”
  • Ōćź
  • fac
  • cape
  • iace

Examples

examples/corpus/conversio/fallibilis.fab (canonical ┬Ę conversio)

Three recovery postures for fallible conversio: inline Ōćź, Ōćź propagation, and fac/cape.

# conversio fallibilis ŌĆö inline Ōćź, propagation, and fac/cape recovery
#
# Posture 1: `expr Ōå” T Ōćź recovery` handles failure at the site.
# Posture 2: bare `Ōå”` inside `ŌåÆ T Ōćź textus` propagates to callers.
# Posture 3: `fac { ŌĆ” }` with `cape err { ŌĆ” }` absorbs propagated conversio failure.
#
# BACKEND:
#   Rust lowers all three postures (inline `Ōćź`, propagation, `fac`/`cape`).
#   Go/TS remain diagnostic-only until their failable stacks mature.

functio epochZero() ŌåÆ instans {
    redde "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z" Ōå” instans
}

functio parseInstans(valor v) ŌåÆ instans Ōćź textus {
    redde v Ōå” instans
}

functio inlineRecovery(valor v) ŌåÆ instans {
    redde v Ōå” instans Ōćź epochZero()
}

functio tutum(valor v) ŌåÆ instans {
    fac {
        redde parseInstans(v)
    }
    cape err {
        mone err
        redde epochZero()
    }
}

functio tutumDirect(valor v) ŌåÆ instans {
    fac {
        redde v Ōå” instans
    }
    cape err {
        mone err
        redde epochZero()
    }
}

incipit {
    fixum valor good ŌåÉ "1979-05-27T07:32:00Z"
    fixum valor bad ŌåÉ "not-a-datetime"

    adfirma inlineRecovery(good) ŌēĪ (good Ōå” instans)
    adfirma inlineRecovery(bad) ŌēĪ epochZero()

    adfirma tutum(good) ŌēĪ (good Ōå” instans)
    adfirma tutum(bad) ŌēĪ epochZero()

    adfirma tutumDirect(good) ŌēĪ (good Ōå” instans)
    adfirma tutumDirect(bad) ŌēĪ epochZero()

    nota inlineRecovery(good), tutum(good), tutumDirect(good)
}
